items.summary: That question is pretty low-information and weird coming from you, isn't it?
I swear I don't remember watching YouTube shorts again today. It must have been a fluke.
items.last_event_text: it means that I was watching youtube shorts for too long many short small videos one after the other

items.summary: Still not sure why or how I'm supposed to interpret that. Lost in YouTube shorts? What does it even mean?
items.last_event_text: I might have been lost in youtube shorts
